scripts.build:gateway: esbuild src/gateway-entry.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=dist-gateway/server.mjs --external:electron --external:better-sqlite3 --external:chokidar --external:playwright-core --external:chromium-bidi --external:@napi-rs/canvas --external:node-llama-cpp --external:proper-lockfile --external:google-auth-library --external:@google/genai --external:@mariozechner/* --external:@aws-sdk/* --external:@smithy/* --external:@lydell/node-pty --external:sharp --external:sqlite-vec --external:electron-log --external:tar --external:ws --external:node-edge-tts --external:fix-path --external:file-type --external:express --external:@homebridge/ciao --external:@whiskeysockets/baileys --external:pdfjs-dist --external:@clack/prompts --banner:js="import { createRequire as _createRequire } from 'module'; const require = _createRequire(import.meta.url); if (!globalThis.File) { try { globalThis.File = class File extends Blob { constructor(parts, filename, properties) { super(parts, properties); this.name = filename; this.lastModified = (properties && properties.lastModified) || Date.now(); } } } catch (e) {} }" --target=node18
